title: Lesson 82
paragraph: This lesson practices useful nouns for body and health.

words.meaning: the middle part of your arm
the part between your foot and leg
the part between your hand and arm
words.example: He wears a watch on his wrist.

words.meaning: the short thick finger on the side of your hand
the part between your head and body
the front upper part of your body
words.example: He has a pain in his chest.

words.meaning: a body temperature that is too high
a sudden sound from your throat when you are sick
words.example: Her cough is worse at night.

words.meaning: a dark mark on your skin after you are hit
words.example: I have a bruise on my leg.

words.meaning: a small piece of medicine you swallow
